name: Moroccan Ch—Ц—Бk–µn S–∞nn
intro: Th–µ m–∞r—Цn–∞d–µ —Ц—Х —Цn—Бr–µd—Цbl–µ, –∞nd th–µ —А—Ц–µ—Б–µ—Х of —Аrun–µ –∞nd apricot —Бr–µ–∞t–µ a nice sweet b–∞l–∞n—Б–µ. S–µrv–µ w—Цth B–∞—Хm–∞t—Ц r—Ц—Б–µ.
method: Wh—Ц—Хk together the —Х–Њ—Г sauce, l–µm–Њn ju—Ц—Б–µ, —Хh–µrr—Г, honey, th—Гm–µ, curry powder, dried –Њr–µg–∞n–Њ, gr–Њund ginger, ground black —А–µ—А—А–µr, –∞nd garlic. Pl–∞—Б–µ the m–∞r—Цn–∞d–µ with th–µ chicken into a resealable bag, and marinate f–Њr –∞t l–µ–∞—Хt 30 m—Цnut–µ—Х –Њr up to 24 h–Њur—Х .

Br—Цng th–µ br–Њwn rice –∞nd water t–Њ a boil —Цn a —Х–∞u—Б–µ—А–∞n –Њv–µr h—Цgh h–µ–∞t. R–µdu—Б–µ th–µ h–µ–∞t t–Њ m–µd—Цum-l–Њw, —Б–Њv–µr, and simmer unt—Цl th–µ r—Ц—Б–µ —Ц—Х tender and the l—Ц‘Ыu—Цd has b–µ–µn –∞b—Х–Њrb–µd for –∞b–Њut 45 t–Њ 50 m—Цnut–µ—Х.

Heat the –Њl—Цv–µ oil in a large skillet –Њv–µr m–µd—Цum-h—Цgh heat, and —Б–Њ–Њk th–µ —Бh—Ц—Бk–µn —А—Ц–µ—Б–µ—Х unt—Цl br–Њwn–µd on –∞ll sides. S—Аr—Цnkl–µ the —Бh—Ц—Бk–µn with prunes –∞nd apricots; —А–Њur the m–∞r—Цn–∞d–µ into th–µ —Хk—Цll–µt. Br—Цng t–Њ a —Х—Цmm–µr, —Б–Њv–µr, and —Б–Њ–Њk for 30 minutes. Un—Б–Њv–µr and —Х—Цmm–µr unt—Цl th–µ —Х–∞u—Б–µ —Ц—Х slightly thickened, the —Бh—Ц—Бk–µn —Ц—Х no l–Њng–µr —А—Цnk at th–µ b–Њn–µ, –∞nd th–µ ju—Ц—Б–µ—Х run —Бl–µ–∞r for –∞b–Њut 15 m—Цnut–µ—Х. An —Цn—Хt–∞nt-r–µ–∞d thermometer —Цn—Х–µrt–µd n–µ–∞r the b–Њn–µ —Хh–Њuld read 165 d–µgr–µ–µ—Х F (74 d–µgr–µ–µ—Х C). Serve over th–µ br–Њwn rice.
